new_jobs.title: MSupply/Data entry assistant
new_jobs.description:
About MHCO
Maihan Humanitarian Convergence Organization (MHCO) is a national non-government, non-political, and non-profit organization registered with the Ministry of Economy, committed to delivering humanitarian services across Afghanistan. MHCO focuses on various sectors including Health, Education, Protection, Nutrition, Livelihoods, Food Security, and Organizational Development.

Job Description
he MSupply/Data Entry Assistant supports the pharmacy department by ensuring accurate and timely entry of stock data into the mSupply system, maintaining proper inventory records, and assisting with reporting, stock monitoring, and documentation. The role contributes to efficient pharmaceutical supply management and ensures compliance with organizational procedures.
Duties and Responsibilities:
Accurately enter and update pharmaceutical data in the mSupply system , including stock receipts, issues, adjustments, and transfers.
Maintain up-to-date records of medicines and medical supplies in both physical and electronic systems.
Verify and cross-check data with stock cards, bin cards, and delivery notes to ensure accuracy.
Monitor stock levels and report low stock, expiries, and discrepancies to the supervisor.
Assist in preparing stock reports, consumption reports, and inventory summaries on a regular basis.
Ensure proper documentation and filing of all pharmacy records, including invoices, waybills, and stock reports.
Support the pharmacy team during stock counts, physical inventory, and audits.
Maintain confidentiality and integrity of all data entered into the system.
Coordinate with warehouse and pharmacy staff to ensure timely data entry of all transactions.
Identify and report any inconsistencies or errors in the system promptly.
Assist in ensuring compliance with organizational policies and donor requirements related to pharmacy and inventory management.
Perform any other related tasks assigned by the supervisor.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Health Sciences, Computer Science , Business Administration, or a related field.
At least 2 –3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.
Familiarity with mSupply system or other inventory management software is preferred.
Good knowledge of pharmaceutical products and stock management practices.
Strong data entry skills with high attention to accuracy and detail.
Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word) .
Ability to maintain organized records and documentation.
Good communication and coordination skills.
Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
Understanding of basic reporting and documentation procedures.
Knowledge of English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is required.
Strong sense of integrity, confidentiality, and accountability.
Safeguarding and Recruitment Statement – MHCO
At MHCO, we are firmly committed to maintaining a safe, respectful, and inclusive working environment. We do not tolerate any form of inappropriate behaviour, including sexual harassment, exploitation, abuse, or financial misconduct. The safety and well-being of children, young people, adults, and all beneficiaries we engage with are of paramount importance.
All MHCO staff are expected to uphold these principles in accordance with our Code of Conduct and safeguarding policies. We place strong emphasis on recruiting individuals who demonstrate integrity and align with our organizational values.
The selected candidate for this role will receive comprehensive safeguarding training and will be responsible for understanding and adhering to MHCO’s safeguarding standards. Employment offers are subject to satisfactory references and relevant screening checks, which may include criminal background verification and terrorism finance assessments.
we will request information from previous employers regarding any substantiated findings of sexual exploitation, abuse, or harassment, as well as any ongoing investigations at the time of the candidate’s departure.
By submitting an application, candidates confirm their understanding and acceptance of these recruitment procedures .

Submission Guideline
The interested candidate should submit their complete application (CV/Cover letter) through the link provided below.
Note: Only short-listed candidates will be contacted for written Test/Interview
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

Submission Email
https://forms.gle/LAH3auLQapGN9BuW8

details.Experience: At least 2–3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Health Sciences, Computer Science, Business Administration, or a related field.
details.Years of Experience: At least 2–3 years of relevant experience in data entry, pharmacy, or supply chain/warehouse management.

new_jobs.title: آفیسر ارشد انجینر نرم افزار
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
عنوان وظیفه : آفیسر ارشد انجینر نرم افزار
آمریت: آمریت عمومی تکنالوژی معلوماتی
گرید : هفتم (۷)
تعداد بست : یک (۱)
تاریخ آغاز: ۱۴۰۵/۰۲/۰۸
تاریخ ختم : ۱۴۰۵/۰۲/۲۲
نوع اعلان : داخلی و خارجی
نوع استخدام: دائمی

Duties and Responsibilities
· انجام در عملی کردن کامل لایف سایکل توسعه نرم افزار (SDLC)
· ایجاد اسناد در توسعه نودارها، طرح ها و مستندات برای شناسایی نیازمندی ها و راحل ها
· ایجاد کدهای که به خوبی طراحی شده، قابلیت تست داشته و مطابق با استندارد های کد نویسی باشد
· طراحی نمودار های پروسه توسعه، طرح های سیستم و مستندات لازم برای شناسایی نیاز ها و ارائه راه حل های مناسب
· یکپارچه سازی اجزای نرم افزار به یک سیستم نرم افزاری کاملاً کاربردی
· ادغام بخش های مختلف نرم افزار برای ایجاد یک سیستم کامل و کارا
· طراحی برنامه های آزمایش و روش های تضمین کیفیت برای ارزیابی و اطمینان از عملکرد صحیح نرم افزار
· نگهداری مستندات مربوط به عملکرد و ویژه گی های نرم افزار
· عیب یابی، اشکال زدایی و ارتقأ سیستم های موجود
· تشخیص و رفع مشکلات، عیب یابی و به روز رسانی سیستم های فعلی
· رعایت برنامه های پروژه و استاندارد های تکنالوژی
· تحلیل اطمینان از اپدیت بودن نرم افزار با ویژه گی های جدید
· حفظ مکاتبات و اسناد سازی
· ترتیب پلان های کاری و ارایۀ گزارش کاری به مدیر مستقیم و آمر ذیصلاح
· انجام سایر وظایف و مسئولیت های که بتأسی از طرزالعمل ها، دستورالعمل و هدایات مقام مافوق طبق لایحه و مقررات ارجاع میگردد

Job Requirements
درجه تحصیلی
· لیسانس در کمپیوتر ساینس، تکنالوژی معلوماتی اسناد تخصیصی مرتبط به وظیفه و به داشتن سند ماستری در بخش های فوق ترجیح داده میشود
تجربه
· سه (3) سال تجربۀ کاری مرتبط به وظیفه
مهارت ها و توانائی ها
· بلدیت به زبان های رسمی کشور و انگلیسی
· داشتن مهارت های مدیریتی
· فصاحت و بلاغت در گفتار
· آشنائی با برنامه های کمپیوتری Python, Django, FastAPI, .Net, React, Java+SpringBoot
· آشنائی به قوانین و مقررات بانکی
· توانائی در تحریر مکاتیب، پیشنهادات و گزارشات کاری
· فهم و درک مسئولیت کاری و تشخیص مشکلات در ساحۀ کاری
· حفظ محرمیت و ظیفوی
· آگاهی از وظایف و اهداف د افغانستان بانک
· توانایی طراحی و پیاده سازی برنامه های کاربردی که تعاملات کاربر را به خوبی مدیریت کند
· تسلط بر یکی یا چند زبان برنامه نویسی برای توسعۀ نرم افزار
· تسلط بر طراحی و مدیریت پایگاه های داده و استفاده از تکنالوژی های ORM برای ارتباط با پایگاه داده
· توانایی کار با فریم ورک های ویب برای توسعه و پیاده سازی برنامه های کاربردی ویب
· آشنایی با روش توسعه نرم افزار بر اساس تست، که شامل نوشتن تست های واحد قبل از کدنویسی است
· تسلط بر ابزار های مختلف مهندسی نرم افزار برای بهبود فرآیند های توسعه و تست
· قابلیت تهیه و نگهداری مستندات دقیق و کامل برای الزامات و مشخصات نرم افزار
صفات و ارزش های شخصی
صادق، دارای برخورد نیک، حامی احترام متقابل، مبتکر، با دسپلین، پابند به وظیفه و وقت، علاقمند به کار گروپی، همکار، مسئولیت پذیر، تصمیمگیر و مسلکی در بخش کاری

Submission Guidelines
نکات :
· علاقه مندان میتوانند نخست در ویب سایت jobs.dab.gov.af برای خود یوزر ایجاد نموده و بعدا بست مورد نظر را انتخاب نموده و اسناد خواسته شده را به فارمت PDF آپلود نمایید .
· جهت اخذ امتحان فقط با متقاضیان منتخب تماس گرفته میشود .
· تاریخ امتحان بعداً به اطلاع رسانیده میشود.

new_jobs.title: تحلیلگر حفاظت معلومات (Penetration tester)
new_jobs.description:
Role Summary
عنوان وظیفه : تحلیلگر حفاظت معلومات (Penetration tester)
آمریت: آمریت عمومی تکنالوژی معلوماتی
گرید : هشتم (۸)
تعداد بست : یک (۱)
تاریخ آغاز : ۱۴۰۵/۰۲/۰۸
تاریخ ختم : ۱۴۰۵/۰۲/۲۲
نوع اعلان : داخلی و خارجی
نوع استخدام: دائمی

Duties and Responsibilities
وظایف و مسئولیت ها
· همکاری با مدیر مستقیم در مدیریت، نظارت، کنترول و ارزیابی کارکنان و امور بخش جهت ایجاد انگیزه برای بهبود امور، افزایش مؤثریت و بازدهی کار، تعیین نیاز های آموزشی و بالا بردن ارتقای ظرفیت آنان
· همکاری با مدیر مستقیم در طرح و ترتیب پلان های کاری ماهوار، ربعوار، سالانه طبق پلان عمومی و تعدیل اسناد تقنینی و اداری مرتبط
· همکاری با مدیر مستقیم در قسمت تهیۀ مواد لازم جهت طرح، تسوید، تعدیل و طی مراحل اسناد تقنینی و اداری مانند مقررات، لوایح، پلان ها و استراتیژی ها، پالیسی ها، لوایح وظایف کارمندان، طرزالعمل های کاری و فورمه های معیاری
· تأمین ارتباط و همآهنگی با بخش های ذیربط جهت تسهیل روند کاری در خصوص حفاظت معلومات
· مدیریت از نصب و تنظیم سیستم ها و برنامه های امنیتی از جمله ارزیابی سیاست ها و ابزار های انطباق و سیستم های امنیتی مبتنی بر نیازمندی
· ارایۀ معلومات در مورد برنامه های امنیتی و اجرای سیاستهای امنیتی جدید و توصیه ها برای اصلاح سیاست امنیتی به بخش های مربوط
· تحقیق و آگاهی از حملات سایبری بر سیستم های موجود
· روش برای بهبود در نحوه آزمایش نفوذی و توسعه دادن آن . آشنائی با استاندرد های تست امنیت
· انجام دادن آزمایش نفوذی غرض تهدید های سایبری
· تحلیل بدافزارها و آلودگی های سیستم ها و حوادث امنیتی
· شناسائی نقاط آسیب پذیر در تمام سیستم های تکنالوژیکی مربوط به آمریت عمومی تکنالوژی معلوماتی
· جلوگیری و کاهش حملات سایبری بر سیستم های بانکی جهت مصئونیت بشتر
· ترتیب و تنظیم پلان ها، گزارش ها، پالیسی ها، طرزالعمل های تست نفوذی، ارزیابی خطرات و غیره
· جمع آوری، توحید و ترتیب گزارش های هفته وار، ربعوار، سالانه و عندالضرورت از پیشرفت فعالیتها و دست آورد های مدیریت مربوطه
· ترتیب پلان های کاری و ارایۀ گزارش کاری به مدیر مستقیم و آمر ذیصلاح
· انجام سایر وظایف و مسئولیت های که بتأسی از طرزالعمل ها، دستورالعمل و هدایات مقام مافوق طبق لایحه و مقررات ارجاع میگردد.

Job Requirements
درجه تحصیلی
· لیسانس در کمپیوتر ساینس و داشتن سند ماستری در بخش مربوط ترجیح داده میشود.
تجربه
· سه (3) سال تجربۀ کاری مرتبط به وظیفه
مهارت ها و توانائی ها
· بلدیت به زبان های رسمی کشور و انگلیسی
· داشتن مهارت های مدیریتی
· آشنائی با برنامه های کمپیوتری و سیستم های بانکی و سایر اجزای تکنالوجی معلوماتی
· آشنائی کامل با ابزار های تیست نفوذی و تسلط به انجام دادن آن
· بلدیت کامل از Vulnerability Scanning و انجام دادن آن
· بلدیت با برنامه های حفاظت و مصونیت سیستم، آپلیکیشن ها، شبکه، سافتویر ها و سایر موارد مرتبط آن، دارای سرتیفیکیت:
CPENT: Certified ted Penetration Testing Professional
PWK: Penetration Testing with Kali
· توانائی در تحریر مکاتیب، پیشنهادات و گزارشات کاری
· فصاحت و بلاغت گفتاری و نوشتاری
· فهم و درک مسئولیت کاری و تشخیص مشکلات در ساحۀ کاری
· حفظ محرمیت و ظیفوی
· آاگاهی از وظایف و اهداف بانک مرکزی
صفات و ارزش های شخصی
صادق، دارای برخورد نیک، حامی احترام متقابل، مبتکر، با دسپلین، پابند به وظیفه و وقت، علاقمند به کار گروپی، همکار، مسئولیت پذیر، تصمیمگیر و مسلکی در بخش کاری

Submission Guidelines
نکات :
· علاقه مندان میتوانند نخست در ویب سایت jobs.dab.gov.af برای خود یوزر ایجاد نموده و بعدا بست مورد نظر را انتخاب نموده و اسناد خواسته شده را به فارمت PDF آپلود نمایید .
· جهت اخذ امتحان فقط با متقاضیان منتخب تماس گرفته میشود .
· تاریخ امتحان بعداً به اطلاع رسانیده میشود.

expiring_today.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager
expiring_today.description: Role Summary The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services. Duties and Responsibilities Card Issuance and Management: Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA. Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management. Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations. Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution: Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay. Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks. Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity. Customer Service and Support: Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues. Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes. Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response. Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website. Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products. Business and Operations: Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department. Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities. Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements. Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management. Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses. Cross-functional Responsibilities: Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives. Support the rollout of new digital products and services. Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting. Reporting and Documentation: Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems. Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred). Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role. Technical Competencies: Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems. Experience in settlement and dispute management. Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills. Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms. Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage. Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS). Other Skills: Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and coordination skills. Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

expiring_today.title: عضو ویسترن یونین + IT شهری څانګه / نماینده ګی ولایتی
expiring_today.description: Role Summary اجراء / طی مراحل نمودن حواله جات ویسترن یونین در مطابقت کامل با SOP - Strandard Operating Procedure ، اخذ Back Up از کمره های امنیتی و رسیده گی به چالش های تخنیکی / نتورک در داخل نماینده گی Duties and Responsibilities اجراء و طی مراحل حواله جات وارده / صادره در مطابقت کامل با SOP مرتبه از جانب کمپنی ویسترن یونین رعایت کامل دساتیر / رهنمود / پروسیجر های مرتبه از جانب کمپنی ویسترن یونین حفظ و محرمیت توکن و پاسورد شبکۀ مخابراتی ویسترن یونین طی مراحل سریع و بموقع حواله جات وارده / صادره حفظ و نگهداشت اسناد و سوابق حواله جات ویسترن یونین و فایلنگ منظم و مرتب دقت در انجام معاملات ، انجام حواله جات به پول افغانی / دالر در مطابقت کامل با فرمایش مشتریان / مراجعین جلوگیری از مغالطه ها در اسم مشتری / انتخاب کشور گیرندۀ پول حین ارسال حواله جات ویسترن یونین برخورد نیک و حسنه با مشتریان / مراجعین ویسترن یونین اشتراک فعال در چلسات هماهنگی که از جانب مدیر / معاون برگزار میگردد کار گروپی " Team Working" جهت نایل شدن به اهداف / تارگیت تعین شده ایجاد شیر فولدر در کمپیوتر ها، نصب و اشتراک‌گذاری پرینتر و نصب و حذف برنامه‌ها ، تنظیم تاریخ و زمان در سیستم ، افزودن زبان (Language) ، فعال بودن آنتی‌ویروس در تمام کمپیوترها ، اعیار و تنظیم سیستم CBS ، تنظیم، بک اپ و ضبط سیستم های CCTV داشتن معلومات لازم پیرامون روتر (Router) ، سوئیچ (Switch) ، ساخت کیبل شبکه (RJ45) ، اتصال کمپیوترها به شبکه ، یافتن آدرس IP و آدرس MAC و حفظ ان انجام سایرامورات محوله قانونی به هدایت آمر مستقیم Job Requirements 1 درجه تحصیل : لیسانس دررشته کمپیوتر ساینس و اقتصاد. به رشته کمپیوتر ساینس ترجیح داده میشود 2 تجربه کاری : 1 سال در بخش های مربوط به Hardware & Software مهارت های لازم : 1 بلدیت به لسان های رسمی (پشتو و دری) و خارجی : ( حداقل انگلیسی) 2 آگاهی از قوانین ومقررات ویسترن یونین و بلدیت با سیستم تکنالوژی معلوماتی 3 بلدیت با برنامه های مورد ضرورت کمپیوتر.( آفیس ...) و مسایل مربوط به آی تی لایحه وظایف خویش را بطور دقیق مطالعه نموده و با درنظرداشت آن اجراآت می نمایم. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates are requested to submit their application (CV with the Education Document and Tazkira Scan in one PDF format) to the Human Resources Department, Pashtany Bank. To apply, please Click On Apply Now! Only complete applications will be accepted, and short-listed candidates will be contacted to interview

expiring_soon.title: Digital Marketing Manager
expiring_soon.description:
About ZOODPAY
ZoodPay is a telecom services company that began its operations in 2023, founded by a dedicated and creative Afghan investor. The company aims to serve various business models, including B2B, B2C, and C2C, by providing a comprehensive prepaid electronic mobile top-up distribution service across the country.
The Zoodpay platform is developed and managed by a team of experienced professionals with expertise in telecom products, services distribution, and the fintech industry. Its advanced features are thoughtfully designed to meet the needs of merchants, offering a flexible and trustworthy platform that strategically secures their investments and ensures a healthy return on investment over time.
VISION:
Zoodpay is committed to innovation, creativity, and security. The platform offers multiple access channels, delivering the most secure and instantaneous prepaid mobile recharge sales and bundle activation services for mobile network operators (MNOs) customers, both within the country and abroad.
MISSION STATEMENT:
Zoodpay aims to become the leading on-demand electronic mobile top-up distribution platform for merchants and customers globally. Our platform is developed based on the feedback from merchants and customers, enabling all target users to benefit from a comprehensive mobile top-up distribution system that emphasizes ongoing development and collaboration.

Job Description
The Digital Marketing Officer will oversee a wide range of content creation and strategic communication tasks. This role involves developing and managing a content calendar that aligns with Zoodpay's program priorities, including creating engaging social media posts, videos, and graphics.
The officer will lead the production of digital campaigns for key events and manage the internal newsletter. Additionally, they will implement social media strategies to increase engagement and followers, analyze digital trends, and refine strategies based on data insights.
The incumbent will also spearhead digital marketing campaigns, collaborate with influencers, and ensure that all digital content adheres to Zoodpay's branding guidelines and strategic goals while maintaining brand consistency across all digital platforms.
Duties and responsibilities
Website Management: Oversee our Content Management System (CMS) by optimizing Search Engine Optimization (SEO). Ensure that all content is current, maintains a consistent tone of voice, provides a clear user journey, and measures performance against specific KPIs .
Content Creation: Write engaging content tailored for various audiences that aligns with brand guidelines. Stay informed about all aspects of Trees for Life’s work to ensure relevance and accuracy.
Social Media: Plan and coordinate a schedule of activities across platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube to expand our social media audience .
Advertising: Manage Pay-Per-Click (PPC) advertising and online ad campaigns, regularly reviewing and adjusting keywords and ad groups to optimize performance. Additionally, maintain our presence on third-party sites, ensuring all messaging is current .
Email Marketing: Plan and execute a regular schedule of email marketing activities aimed at growing our subscriber base. Create engaging and relevant content, including testing strategies to optimize results.
Print Production: Coordinate the printing and production of our magazine, leaflets, banners, and other materials, including writing, editing, and proofing. Organize occasional print advertisements.
Brand Compliance: Implement brand guidelines and ensure adherence across all areas of work.
Reporting and Analysis: Monitor, report, and analyze results to enhance performance using tools like Google Analytics. Make necessary amendments and improvements based on findings.
Continuous Improvement: Stay updated on the latest trends and best practices in online marketing and measurement. Carry out additional duties as required, in line with the responsibilities of this position.
Motion Graphics Design : create visually engaging animations and videos that combine graphic design with animation to effectively communicate ideas through dynamic visuals. Will work on various projects, including social media content, website animations, and video marketing materials.
Graphic Design : create visual concepts to effectively communicate ideas and messages to consumers. They are responsible for the overall layout and production design of various applications, such as websites, advertisements, brochures, and magazines. Key responsibilities include meeting with Zoodpay Sr. Management to discuss project requirements, developing design concepts, selecting appropriate media and design elements, preparing drafts, and ensuring that the final product meets Zoodpay's needs and quality standards

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, or a related field.
Proven 5+ years of working experience in digital marketing or a related role
Certification in Graphic Design and Digital Marketing is preferred.
Strong professional skills in graphic design, including image and video creation, with a high priority placed on motion graphics expertise.
Strong understanding of current online marketing concepts, strategies, and best practices.
Experience with SEO, PPC, Google Analytics, and various social media platforms.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Ability to analyze data and provide evidence-based recommendations.
Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities.
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
Familiarity with content management systems (CMS).
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are encouraged to submit their CVs along with a cover letter to hr@zood-pay.com by April 30, 2026. Please include the vacancy number, position title (VA-ZP-26-03 Digital Marketing Manager) in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be considered.

details.Experience: Proven 5+ years of working experience in digital marketing or a related role

expiring_soon.title: Full-Stack Developer / DevOps Engineer
expiring_soon.description:
About ZOODPAY
ZoodPay is a telecom services company that began its operations in 2023, founded by a dedicated and creative Afghan investor. The company aims to serve various business models, including B2B, B2C, and C2C, by providing a comprehensive prepaid electronic mobile top-up distribution service across the country.
The Zoodpay platform is developed and managed by a team of experienced professionals with expertise in telecom products, services distribution, and the fintech industry. Its advanced features are thoughtfully designed to meet the needs of merchants, offering a flexible and trustworthy platform that strategically secures their investments and ensures a healthy return on investment over time.
VISION:
Zoodpay is committed to innovation, creativity, and security. The platform offers multiple access channels, delivering the most secure and instantaneous prepaid mobile recharge sales and bundle activation services for mobile network operators (MNOs) customers, both within the country and abroad.
MISSION STATEMENT:
Zoodpay aims to become the leading on-demand electronic mobile top-up distribution platform for merchants and customers globally. Our platform is developed based on the feedback from merchants and customers, enabling all target users to benefit from a comprehensive mobile top-up distribution system that emphasizes ongoing development and collaboration.

Job Description
We are seeking a skilled Full-Stack Developer with DevOps experience to join our technology unit and take ownership of our unified mobile top-up platform once delivered by the contractor. This individual will be responsible for ongoing development, system maintenance, deployment automation, and continuous improvements. The role requires a hands-on developer who can ensure the reliability, scalability, and security of our platform while working closely with business and network teams.
Key Responsibilities:
Post-handover ownership of the mobile top-up system.
Develop, test, and deploy new features and small enhancements.

Technical Skills:
Strong knowledge of front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue).

Experience with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).
DevOps skills: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitLab CI/Jenkins/GitHub Actions).

Knowledge of APIs, system integrations, and micro services.

5+ years in full-stack development & system operations.
Strong problem-solving, debugging, and performance tuning skills.
Familiarity with telecom, Fintech, or e-top-up systems is a plus.
Soft Skills
Proactive and self-driven with a sense of ownership.
Good communication and documentation ability.
Ability to work in a lean startup-style environment.
Team player with mentoring potential.
KPIs
System uptime and performance (99%+ availability).
Timely deployment of updates and bug fixes.
Reduced reliance on external contractors.
Smooth handover and continuity post-launch.
Security and compliance incidents minimized.

Submission Guidelines

Please include the vacancy number, position title (VA-ZP-26-04-Full-Stack Developer / DevOps Engineer) in the subject line of your email; otherwise, your application will not be considered.

expiring_soon.title: Graphic Designer – Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks
expiring_soon.description:
About Researches Organization for Development (ROD)
The Research Organization for Development (ROD) is a registered Afghan non-governmental organization specializing in remote sensing, Geographic Information Systems (GIS), climate analysis, hydrology, and agricultural development. ROD operates through partnerships with leading international organizations including Welthungerhilfe (WHH), Catholic Relief Services (CRS), the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO), the World Meteorological Organization (WMO), and the World Bank, drawing on a global network of more than one hundred researchers.
Under its ongoing partnership with Welthungerhilfe (WHH), ROD is implementing the Farmer Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks project across five provinces in Afghanistan's Northern Agro-Ecological Region. The project aims to translate complex climate, hydrological, and agronomic analysis into clear, visual, and practical guidance that supports smallholder farmers many of whom have limited literacy in making informed cropping decisions under changing climate conditions.
Each of the five target provinces will receive a dedicated, province-specific handbook reflecting local climate conditions, water resources, crop calendars, and twelve recommended crops. To ensure these handbooks are accessible, culturally appropriate, and visually compelling, ROD is seeking a qualified Graphic Designer to lead the visual development and production of all handbook materials and related communication products.

Job Description
The Graphic Designer will be responsible for transforming ROD's technical content into visually engaging, farmer-friendly publications that communicate climate-smart agricultural guidance effectively to low-literacy audiences in Dari and Pashto. The designer will work closely with ROD's technical team (GIS specialists, agronomists, hydrologists, and climate analysts) to develop a unified visual identity, a master template, and final print-ready handbooks and supporting materials.
3. Scope of Work
Under the direct supervision of the Project Lead / Principal Investigator, the Graphic Designer will undertake the following tasks:
3.1 Design Strategy and Visual Identity
Develop a coherent visual identity and style guide for the Agro-Climate Crop Handbook series, aligned with ROD's brand (teal #217178 and orange #F78F1E) and WHH's visual standards.
Propose and agree with the project team on a design approach suitable for low-literacy rural audiences, emphasizing clarity, iconography, and illustration over dense text.
Design a master layout template (Dari/Pashto RTL-compliant) that can be adapted across the five province-specific handbooks.
3.2 Handbook Layout and Production
Design and lay out five (5) province-specific Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks (one per province), each covering twelve recommended crops, climate profiles, water resources, crop calendars, risk advisories, and good agricultural practices.
Integrate GIS-derived maps, remote sensing outputs, and charts provided by the technical team into the handbook layouts, ensuring cartographic clarity and consistent styling.
Develop custom infographics and data visualizations for climate trends, crop calendars, water availability, and climate risk indicators.
Create a custom icon set and illustration library (hand-drawn or vector illustration style) tailored to Afghan rural contexts and culturally appropriate.
Ensure all typography, layout direction, and text flow fully comply with Dari and Pashto right-to-left (RTL) conventions and use appropriate Persian/Pashto fonts.
3.3 Supporting Communication Materials
Design farmer-facing posters summarizing key messages from each provincial handbook for display at community and extension level.
Design extension flyers and leaflets to complement the handbooks for field distribution by WHH and partners.
Design WHH-facing report covers, title pages, and layout templates for associated project reports and deliverables.
3.4 Review, Validation, and Finalization
Incorporate feedback from ROD's internal technical review, WHH review, and farmer validation focus group discussions conducted in the field.
Prepare final print-ready files (high-resolution PDF/X, CMYK color profile), packaged InDesign source files with all linked assets, editable vector files, and embedded/outlined fonts.
Provide digital versions (web-optimized PDFs) suitable for online publication and sharing.
3.5 Coordination and Documentation
Participate in regular coordination meetings with the Project Lead and technical team.
Maintain clear version control of all design files and submit editable source files at the end of the assignment.
Document the design style guide and template specifications to enable future updates by ROD.

Job Requirements
4. 1 Education
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field. A Master's degree or specialized certification is an asset.
4.2 Professional Experience
Minimum two (2) years of demonstrated professional experience for male candidate and one (1) year for female candidate in graphic design and editorial/publication layout, preferably for NGOs, international organizations, or development projects.
Proven track record designing publications for low-literacy or rural audiences, with a strong portfolio of farmer-facing, community-oriented, or extension materials.
Prior experience designing multilingual publications in Dari and/or Pashto (RTL layout) is essential.
Experience integrating maps, infographics, and data visualizations into printed materials is highly desirable.
4.3 Technical Skills (Essential)
Expert proficiency in Adobe InDesign and Adobe Illustrator (essential).
Strong skills in Adobe Photoshop and related graphic production tools.
Demonstrated ability to design infographics and data visualizations (climate data, crop calendars, risk charts).
Demonstrated experience with Dari/Pashto RTL typography, including appropriate Persian/Pashto font selection and layout conventions.
Strong illustration skills, preferably with a hand-drawn or custom vector style suitable for low-literacy audiences.
Sound understanding of print production workflows, color management (CMYK), and preparing press-ready files.
4.4 Desirable Skills
Familiarity with cartographic design principles and integrating GIS outputs into publications.
Experience designing for humanitarian or agricultural development projects in Afghanistan or similar contexts.
Basic knowledge of accessibility and inclusive design principles.
4.5 Language
Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto is required.
Working knowledge of English is required for communication with the technical team and reviewing source content.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are invited to submit the following documents:
A cover letter (maximum one page) outlining motivation and suitability for the position.
An updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) with at least two professional references.
A portfolio of previous relevant design work (PDF or web link), with particular emphasis on publications, infographics, and Dari/Pashto layouts.
Applications should be submitted by email to: hr@rod.af
Subject line: "Graphic Designer – Agro-Climate Crop Handbooks – [Applicant Name]"
Closing date: Open until filled. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and interviews will be conducted as suitable candidates apply. The position will be closed once a desired candidate is identified and contracted.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a short design test as part of the selection process. ROD reserves the right to cancel, postpone, or modify this announcement at any stage.

Submission Email
hr@rod.af

details.Experience: Minimum two (2) years of demonstrated professional experience for male candidate and one (1) year for female candidate in graphic design and editorial/publication layout, preferably for NGOs, international organizations, or development projects.
details.Education: Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field. A Master's degree or specialized certification is an asset.

expiring_soon.title: Procurement officer
expiring_soon.salary: As per company Salary Scale Policy
expiring_soon.description: About Hindukush Bridge ICT-Services Company HKB-ICT is a leading internet and communication company aiming to make Afghanistan go online in ten coming years. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company is a Kabul-based company specializing in providing internet services to NOGs, Government, local offices, and Home Users in Afghanistan. This company is 100% Afghan-owned and a team of highly qualified professionals having over a decade of experience in the various areas of ISP and ICT sector with different national and international organizations manages its operations. Hindukush Bridge has a great partnership with most of the main players in the satellite and telecom industry. We are offering many added-value services to our partner/customer all over Afghanistan, along with a 24/7 hours Network Operation Center. Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company functioning under a valid License Number (66724) issued by the Ministry of Commerce and Industry by the name of Hindukush Bridge ICT Services Company the Company has professional and technical staff in various fields such as surveying, analyzing, budget estimation, project management, reporting and documentation, data-related issues. Job Description A Procurement Officer is responsible for sourcing, negotiating, and managing contracts for telecom equipment, IT hardware/software, and services essential to network operations. The role requires strong vendor management, cost optimization, and compliance with industry standards. The Procurement Officer ensures timely and cost-effective acquisition of goods and services critical to ISP operations, including networking equipment, fiber optic cables, routers, servers, software licenses, and facility services. They act as the link between technical teams and suppliers to maintain uninterrupted service delivery. Key Responsibilities Supplier Management Identify, evaluate, and onboard reliable vendors for telecom and IT products. Negotiate contracts, pricing, and service-level agreements (SLAs). Maintain long-term supplier relationships to ensure continuity of supply. Procurement Operations Manage purchase requisitions and approvals in line with company policy. Ensure timely delivery of equipment and services to support network expansion and maintenance. Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with warehouse/logistics teams. Cost & Compliance Optimize procurement costs while maintaining quality standards. Ensure compliance with local regulations, ISP licensing requirements, and company procurement policies. Prepare procurement reports for management and auditors. Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with engineering, IT, and finance departments to align procurement with technical needs and budget. Support project teams in sourcing specialized equipment for new installations or upgrades. Job Requirements Education : Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Engineering, or related field. Experience : 3–5 years in procurement, preferably in telecom/ISP or IT industries. Skills : Strong negotiation and contract management skills. Knowledge of telecom/ISP equipment and vendor landscape. Analytical and financial acumen for cost control. Proficiency in ERP/procurement software. Excellent communication in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto for Kabul context). Personal Attributes : Detail-oriented, organized, and proactive. Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects. Ethical and transparent in procurement practices. Submission Guideline Those who fulfill the above-mentioned criteria should send their updated CV & Cover letter to the email below: While applying, kindly mention the Vacancy number “HKB/Kabul/Procurement/2026” in the subject line of E-mail. Without doing so, your application will not be considered complete. Submission Email hr@hindukush-bridge.com

expiring_soon.title: RAN Drive Test Engineer
expiring_soon.description: Role Summary The DT Engineer is responsible for performing network drive test (DT) activities on the Radio Access Network (RAN) across multi-vendor and multi-technology 2G, 3G, and LTE sites. Duties and Responsibilities Network DT activities performed on the RAN covering multi-vendor/multi-technology 2G, 3G & LTE sites. Detailed knowledge of all OEM parameter and feature sets as well as recommended settings, OEM KPI’s and counters, counters specific to measure subscriber experience, Handling Post Processing procedures/ guidelines. Identification of KPIs relating to coverage, accessibility, mobility, integrity, and service retainability for optimization for all Radio bearers/ services including Voice and Data. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues, poor network services, loss of signal strength and data service faults on the network. Customer Complaint management which includes both proactive and reactive quality improvement initiatives. Coordinating with Optimization teams, scheduling daily, weekly, monthly, Ad-hoc activities to perform detailed DTs. RF Coverage analysis, parameter optimizations, antenna tilt verifications and suggestions. Periodic network motorway drive test campaigns in major metros, Ad-hoc drive testing for quality benchmarking and RAN Optimisation activities including Single Site Verification Test report for newly integrated sites of technologies. Maintaining a parameter & customer complaint database which details all the RAN parameters under control of the Optimisation Dept. Analyzed logs of Radio tools for identifying issues in the coverage and quality area. Proactively identify and escalate areas with network coverage issues and faults in the network. Collaborate with business support service teams to identify new potential sales areas. Must have Hands-on Routine network activities. Radio Network Topology Audit, Radio Network Parameter consistency checks Major route drive testing, Malls, IBS/DAS, walk/drive testing. Sign-off the performance acceptance as per agreed Quality Targets for all modernization projects. Strong Hands-on and Knowledge of DT & Post Processing Tools (e.g., TEMS, Nemo, MapInfo, Actix, GE Tools). OH&S/QMS Role and Responsibilities: Reports any hazards or risks in addition to Accidents/Incident to QHSE department. Be aware of and complies to i engineering’s IMS Policy. Abides by i engineering’s Local Legal and Client Requirements. Attends and engages in IMS Awareness Sessions. Ensures that all IMS procedures are regularly followed and raises the issue when they are not Job Requirements Minimum 2-3 years of experience. Must have strong telecom skills and knowledge of common programs such as Microsoft Office. Ability to work under pressure. Capable of professionally managing confidential information. Submission Guidelines Make sure to write the position title and vacancy number in the subject line of your email and send your CV along with a cover letter. Only short listed candidates will be notified.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Operation Manager
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services. Duties and Responsibilities Card Issuance and Management: Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA. Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management. Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations. Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution: Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay. Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks. Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity. Customer Service and Support: Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues. Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes. Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response. Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website. Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products. Business and Operations: Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department. Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities. Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements. Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management. Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses. Cross-functional Responsibilities: Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives. Support the rollout of new digital products and services. Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting. Reporting and Documentation: Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems. Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred). Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role. Technical Competencies: Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems. Experience in settlement and dispute management. Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills. Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms. Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage. Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS). Other Skills: Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities. Excellent communication and coordination skills. Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number AUB/EA/VA/026-018 in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Chief Information Officer
tech_banking_jobs.description: Role Summary The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is a senior executive responsible for leading the bank’s overall information technology (IT) strategy and operations. The CIO ensures that technology systems support the bank’s strategic goals, enhance operational efficiency, and comply with regulatory requirements. This role involves overseeing IT infrastructure, digital banking systems, cybersecurity frameworks, and data management practices. The CIO plays a critical role in driving digital transformation, improving customer experience through technology, and ensuring the security and integrity of all banking systems. The CIO collaborates with executive management and other departments to identify technological needs, implement innovative solutions, and manage IT risks. Additionally, the role ensures business continuity, system reliability, and alignment of IT initiatives with the bank’s long-term objectives. Duties and Responsibilities Chief Information Officer shall develop goals, roadmap and executing a multi-year technology strategy supporting the full range of business services, and ensure the IT department runs smoothly and effectively. Chief Information Officer shall provide vision and leadership for developing and implementing information technology initiatives and Chief Information Officer is a member of the Executive Leadership Team and directs the planning and implementation of enterprise IT systems in support of business operations in order to improve cost effectiveness and service quality, Chief Information Officer shall direct activities of the IT Department, providing leadership and supervising of IT staff and ensures Compliance with bank’s policies and procedures as well monitor changes in the technology sector to discover ways the company can improve and develop. Chief Information Officer is responsible for daily operations of technology and technology-related systems and in providing ongoing service to internal staff and other stakeholders, also responsible for all aspects of the organization’s information technology and systems, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer Shall Lead IT strategic and operational planning to achieve business goals by fostering innovation, prioritizing IT initiatives, and coordinating the evaluation, deployment and management of current and future IT resources and systems across the organization. Chief Information Officer Shall Create state of the organization dynamic security practices across the IT department and bank as well provide high quality day-to-day operations of technology and technology enabled business functions. Chief Information Officer shall develop and maintain an appropriate IT organizational structure that supports the organization’s needs, including information and cybersecurity. Chief Information Officer shall stay abreast of emerging technologies that can improve IT department performance and bring cost effectiveness to the company. Chief Information Officer responsible to stay at the forefront of IT risk and security issues facing the Bank also Assess and make recommendations on the improvement or re-engineering of the IT department. Chief Information Officer shall maintain security standards appropriate for the bank’s size and complexity and Develop, track, and control the IT annual operating and capital budgets. Chief Information Officer shall collaborate with senior leaders to ensure technology strategy and investment are in line with business function objectives and Acting as a senior point of escalation to troubleshoot, report and resolve issues as well supervise the networks and computer systems including Core Banking applications and Databases in the company to ensure optimal performance. Chief Information Officer shall serve as the senior technical solutions analyst and ensuring strategic technology decisions are evaluated and assessed in line with technology industry standards. Chief Information Officer shall identify security threats, formulate strategies and methods to mitigate the threats. Chief Information Officer Shall Plan, Direct and establish IT-related projects as well create and adapt technological platforms to improve the customer experience. Chief Information Officer is responsible for Troubleshoot date-related issues and establish regular maintenance. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper-level IT staff to develop and implement department goals and implementing IT policies, protocols and standards. Chief Information officer shall Develops and implement strategies to improve the efficiency and efficacy of technologies initiatives appropriate support to company-wide goals. Chief Information Officer is responsible to review performance of IT staff and develop their Job Descriptions. Chief Information Officer is Responsible for the development, review and certification of all back-up and disaster recovery procedures and plans as well planning data storage and monitoring performance of databases. Chief Information officer shall Train IT staff personnel to enhance their skills and knowledge. Chief Information officer shall monitor and regular check-up of IT succession plan and develop succession plan for key IT positions. Chief Information Officer shall work with upper management and senior IT staff to develop the IT department budget as well review and recommend IT department purchases and payments. Chief Information officer shall Review Vendor proposals and makes decisions based on things such as price, what they offer, and how the vendor product may fit into the organization. Chief Information officer shall communicate with other executives regarding costs, value and risk-potential of new IT projects. Chief Information Officer Shall Oversees the development and testing of new programs developed specifically for the company. Chief Information Officer Shall Ensures the company’s data remains secure by keeping up to date on the latest cyber security threats and finds ways to guard against them on an organization-wide scale. Chief Information officer shall Coaches members of the IT teams, particularly IT leaders, so everyone stays on the same pate across the company. Chief Information officer shall Communicates with other executive members to make sure all parts of the company use technology in the best ways possible. To attend to any other matter that may not have been mentioned in this document but is otherwise required to be attended by the job holder. Besides, the Job Holder is to attend to any Bank related assignment given by CEO, Board of Supervisors or General Meeting of Share Holders. Job Requirements Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science required; Master’s degree preferred. Professional Certificates in cybersecurity, information Technology, and modern threats. Experience: Minimum 7-10 Year experience in managing or directing IT operation in financial institutions. Skills: Proven experience as chief information officer or similar managerial role. Excellent knowledge of IT systems and infrastructure. Background in designing/developing IT systems and planning implementation. Solid understanding of data analysis, budgeting and business operations. Superior analytical and problem-solving capabilities. Strong strategic and business mindset. Excellent organizational and leadership skills. Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities. Personal Attributes: Visionary thinker Perseverance Patience Risk Taking Ability Outgoing Personality Service-oriented skills Leadership Skills: Supervisory skills Motivational skills Ability to take ownership Delegation of work Entrepreneurial skills Staff Management Skills Decision-Making Skills Submission Guidelines Please mention specific Job Title and Vacancy numbers in subject line of your E-mail otherwise your application will not be considered. Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV) to email address ( sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com ) Applicants while applying for this position must take in CC entire Email address of ( info.bsd@dab.gov.af ) otherwise the applications will not be considered. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
